title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 10690 NE Cornell Road Suite 220 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm (503) 848-5861 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 848-5861 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and other intrepretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 48 stops on NE Cornell Road and bus 52 stops on 185th Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - PRENATAL CARE OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - GENERAL DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC
